sql: SELECT     EXTRACT(MONTH FROM booking_date) AS month,     COUNT(transaction_id) AS transaction_count FROM transaction_info WHERE booking_date >= '2025-01-01'   AND booking_date < '2026-01-01' GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM booking_date) ORDER BY month;
